title: alibaba: add negative_prompt to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema
description: DashScope's wan2.7-image(-pro) accepts negative_prompt but our image-generation parameter schema omits it. Our video-synthesis parameter schema already exposes it (packages/provider/alibaba/src/zod.ts:105), so this is a per-surface inconsistency. Touch zod.ts:279-292, matching type in types.ts, matching PayloadSchema in schemas.ts, and re-record an alibaba-wan-image integration test case that sets negative_prompt.
close_reason: Added negative_prompt (max 500) and prompt_extend to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema in zod.ts:279-292; extended schema.safeParse test coverage in tests/integration/alibaba-wan-image.test.ts

title: alibaba: add prompt_extend to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema
description: DashScope's wan image APIs accept prompt_extend (LLM-based prompt rewriting). Our video-synthesis schema has it at zod.ts:114 but image-generation does not. Same file trio as the negative_prompt task.
close_reason: Added negative_prompt (max 500) and prompt_extend to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema in zod.ts:279-292; extended schema.safeParse test coverage in tests/integration/alibaba-wan-image.test.ts

title: Add OpenAI gpt-image-2-2026-04-21 image coverage
description: Add support/discoverability for the OpenAI image model gpt-image-2-2026-04-21 across text-to-image and image-to-image paths, and add recorded integration harness tests for each using the existing cat2.jpg fixture that matches the attached reference image.

title: Add Hunyuan Image v3 Instruct Edit model
description:
Add support for fal-ai/hunyuan-image/v3/instruct/edit endpoint to the fal provider.

Endpoint: https://fal.run/fal-ai/hunyuan-image/v3/instruct/edit
Category: image-to-image

Required fields:
- prompt (string)
- image_urls (array of URLs, max 3)

Optional fields:
- image_size (auto or named sizes or custom dimensions)
- num_images (1-4, default 1)
- guidance_scale (1-20, default 3.5)
- seed (int)
- enable_safety_checker (bool, default true)
- sync_mode (bool)
- output_format (jpeg|png, default png)

Files to modify:
1. packages/provider/fal/src/zod.ts - add request schema
2. packages/provider/fal/src/types.ts - add response type and namespace interfaces
3. packages/provider/fal/src/fal.ts - add endpoint function
4. packages/provider/fal/src/index.ts - export new types
5. scripts/endpoint-docs.tsv - add endpoint documentation
6. tests/integration/fal-hunyuan-image-v3-instruct-edit.test.ts - add integration test
close_reason: Implemented Hunyuan Image v3 Instruct Edit model with full Zod schema validation, types, endpoint function, and integration tests

title: fal: wrap xai/grok-imagine-video/edit-video
description: Add edit-video endpoint for the xAI Grok Imagine video model on fal. Takes a source video URL plus prompt to edit (e.g. 'Colorize the video'). Output resolution selectable (auto|480p|720p).

title: fal: wrap xai/grok-imagine-video/extend-video
description: Add extend-video endpoint for the xAI Grok Imagine video model on fal. Takes a source video URL (2-15s MP4) plus prompt, emits a stitched extended video. Sibling to image-to-video and reference-to-video on the same namespace.

title: fal: wrap xai/grok-imagine-video/reference-to-video
description: Add reference-to-video endpoint for the xAI Grok Imagine video model on fal. Supports up to 7 reference images with @Image1, @Image2, etc. prompt syntax. Mirrors the existing image-to-video sibling and follows the recently-added Seedance 2.0 reference-to-video pattern.

title: Fix fal Seedream v5 Lite image_size + image_urls schema gaps
description: FalSeedreamV5LiteEditRequestSchema and FalSeedreamV5LiteTextToImageRequestSchema in packages/provider/fal/src/zod.ts are missing 6 preset image_size enum values (square_hd, square, portrait_4_3, portrait_16_9, landscape_4_3, landscape_16_9) plus auto_3K, and incorrectly include auto_4K which isn't in upstream docs. Edit schema also has unbounded image_urls (upstream caps at 10).

title: Fill WAN image schema gaps in fal/alibaba
description:
Four gaps identified vs upstream WAN image docs:
1. FAL wan v2.7 T2I+Edit (pro + non-pro): cap prompt at 2000 chars, negative_prompt at 500 chars
2. Alibaba wan2.7-image: tighten size from bare string to union (enum 1K/2K/4K OR '<w>*<h>' regex)
3. FAL wan v2.7 pro T2I: add explicit width/height fields (1-14142) as alternative to image_size
4. Alibaba: verify whether prompt_extend/negative_prompt are actually honored by wan2.7-image models, then drop if not
Source: gap analysis against fal.ai and help.aliyun.com docs.

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.6 text-to-image + image-to-image
description: Upstream endpoints POST /v1/wan/v2.6/text-to-image (adds image_url style guide, max_images 1-5, returns generated_text) and /v1/wan/v2.6/image-to-image (image_urls required 1-3, enable_prompt_expansion default true, num_images 1-4). Namespace differs from fal-ai/wan/* (it's under 'wan/' directly).

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image + image-to-image
description: Upstream endpoints POST /v1/fal-ai/wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image and /image-to-image. Adds LoRA-era parameters beyond v2.7: num_inference_steps (default 27), guidance_scale (default 3.5), guidance_scale_2 (default 4), shift (1.0-10.0 default 2), image_format (png|jpeg), loras (list). Two new factory properties under fal.wan.v2p2A14b.*.

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.7/edit-video (video-to-video editing)
description: Upstream POST https://api.fal.ai/v1/fal-ai/wan/v2.7/edit-video accepts prompt, video_url, reference_image_url, resolution (720p|1080p), aspect_ratio, duration (0-10, 0=auto), audio_setting (auto|origin), seed, enable_safety_checker. Add fal.wan.v2p7.editVideo factory property with types, zod schema, payloadSchema, URL comment, endpoint-docs.tsv row, and integration test.

title: alibaba: extend video model enum with wan2.6/wan2.5/wan2.2/wanx2.1 variants
description: zod.ts:121 currently only lists wan2.7-i2v and wan2.7-videoedit. DashScope also ships wan2.6-{t2v,t2v-us,i2v,i2v-flash,i2v-us}, wan2.5-i2v-preview, wan2.2-i2v-{flash,plus}, wanx2.1-i2v-{turbo,plus}, wanx2.1-kf2v-plus. Extend the enum and add model-specific parameter branches where they differ.

title: alibaba: wrap /image2image/image-synthesis (wanx2.1-imageedit with 10 functions)
description: DashScope exposes wanx2.1-imageedit via POST /api/v1/services/aigc/image2image/image-synthesis with 10 function values: stylization_all/local, description_edit, description_edit_with_mask, doodle (sketch-to-image), remove_watermark, expand, super_resolution, colorization, cartoon_reference, control_cartoon_feature. Largest single capability hole in alibaba. Needs a new factory property, a new schema discriminated by the 'function' field, and one integration test per high-value function (start with stylize, doodle, super_resolution).

title: alibaba: support wan2.6-image model and its enable_interleave / max_images flags
description: DashScope's /image-generation/generation endpoint also accepts model=wan2.6-image with two model-specific parameters: enable_interleave (text/image interleaved output) and max_images (1-5 in interleaved mode; n stays 1-4 in editing mode). Extend model enum at zod.ts:295 and add the two optional parameters.

title: Epic: close WAN coverage gaps across kie/fal/alibaba
description: Cross-provider WAN audit identified missing parameters and unwrapped sibling endpoints in fal and alibaba. KIE has no actionable gaps. See plan at ~/.claude/plans/find-all-the-gaps-quizzical-wombat.md for the full gap catalog. Child issues track each concrete change.

title: Implement native DashScope uploads endpoint + HAR test
description: Add GET /api/v1/uploads?action=getPolicy&model=<model> to @apicity/alibaba. This is the two-step OSS-signed upload flow (parallel to fal.storage.upload.initiate). Include a HAR integration test that fetches the policy and POSTs a real fixture (tests/fixtures/cat1.jpg) to the returned OSS host, verifying the server accepts the file.

title: Fill image/video gen coverage gaps: Seedance, WAN, Kling, Grok, image gens
description:
Add endpoints to fal and kie packages to cover model-level gaps identified in coverage analysis 2026-04-18. Scope: Seedance, WAN, Kling, Grok Imagine, and all image generation models.

fal additions (16):
- bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/text-to-video
- bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/image-to-video
- fal-ai/wan/v2.7/text-to-video
- fal-ai/wan/v2.7/image-to-video
- fal-ai/kling-video/v3/standard/text-to-video
- fal-ai/kling-video/v3/standard/image-to-video
- fal-ai/kling-video/v3/pro/text-to-video
- fal-ai/kling-video/v3/standard/motion-control
- fal-ai/kling-video/v3/pro/motion-control
- fal-ai/kling-video/v2.6/standard/motion-control
- fal-ai/kling-video/v2.6/pro/motion-control
- fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/standard/image-to-video
- fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/pro/image-to-video
- fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/master/image-to-video
- fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/master/text-to-video
- xai/grok-imagine-video/text-to-video

kie model-slug additions (12):
- google/nano-banana (t2i)
- google/nano-banana-edit (i2i)
- gpt-image/1.5-text-to-image
- sora-2-text-to-video
- sora-2-image-to-video
- kling/v2-1-standard
- kling/v2-1-pro
- kling/v2-1-master
- qwen/image-to-image
- qwen/image-edit
- bytedance/seedream-v4-text-to-image
- bytedance/seedream-v4-edit

Each endpoint: types + schema + factory wiring + URL comment + endpoint-docs.tsv entry + integration test + HAR recording. Commit per logical group.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 pro text-to-image endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/pro/text-to-image to @apicity/fal. New: run.wan.v2p7.pro.textToImage. Same schema/response as wan.v2p7.textToImage — different URL + Pro tier price.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 pro edit endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/pro/edit (image-to-image, Pro tier) to @apicity/fal. New: run.wan.v2p7.pro.edit. Same schema/response as wan.v2p7.edit — different URL + higher price tier.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 edit endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/edit (image-to-image) to @apicity/fal. New: run.wan.v2p7.edit. Requires prompt+image_urls; optional negative_prompt, image_size, num_images (1-4), enable_prompt_expansion, seed, enable_safety_checker.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 text-to-image endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/text-to-image endpoint to @apicity/fal. New run namespace: run.wan.v2p7.textToImage. Includes types, zod schema, factory wiring, URL comment, endpoint-docs.tsv entry, and integration test.

title: kie: integration test for seedream/5-lite-image-to-image
description: Spec was newly published for the image-to-image variant. Schema/registration already exists from earlier work but no integration test or HAR fixture covers it. Tighten zod constraints (prompt 3-3000, image_urls max 14) to match the upstream spec and add an integration test that mirrors the text-to-image variant.

title: Finish all non-api non-pollyjs tests for all providers
Finish all non-api non-pollyjs tests for all providers
xai: tighten image aspect_ratio to explicit enum
description: XaiImageGenerateRequestSchema and XaiImageEditRequestSchema in packages/provider/xai/src/zod.ts currently declare aspect_ratio as z.string().optional() (permissive). Upstream /v1/images/generations accepts a fixed set of 14 values per https://docs.x.ai/docs/guides/image-generations: 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 3:2, 2:3, 2:1, 1:2, 19.5:9, 9:19.5, 20:9, 9:20, auto. Replace z.string() with z.enum([...]) for both image generate and edit schemas so invalid values are caught client-side. Video schema (XaiVideoGenerateRequestSchema) already uses a 7-value enum that matches upstream — leave it. No capability change; pure validation polish.

title: fal: wrap wan-vace-apps/video-edit endpoint
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-vace-apps/video-edit. Editing endpoint for the VACE model.

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image/lora endpoint
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image/lora. Same params as v2.2-a14b text-to-image plus full LoRA list support.

title: fal: wrap wan-vace inpainting endpoints (v2.2 fun-a14b + vace-14b)
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-22-vace-fun-a14b/inpainting and /v1/fal-ai/wan-vace-14b/inpainting. Video inpainting with masking: prompt, video_url, mask_video_url, mask_image_url, ref_image_urls, num_frames (81-241), frames_per_second (5-30), resolution, aspect_ratio, num_inference_steps, guidance_scale, sampler, shift, acceleration, video_quality, video_write_mode, interpolator_model.

title: fal: wrap wan-25-preview text-to-image + image-to-image
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-25-preview/text-to-image and /image-to-image. Preview endpoints; num_images (not max_images), otherwise v2.7-like. Two new factory properties.

title: Add kie model slugs: nano-banana v1, gpt-image/1.5-text-to-image, sora-2 t2v/i2v, kling v2-1, qwen/*, seedream-v4
description: Expand KieMediaModelSchema in kie/src/zod.ts to add slugs: google/nano-banana, google/nano-banana-edit, gpt-image/1.5-text-to-image, sora-2-text-to-video, sora-2-image-to-video, kling/v2-1-standard, kling/v2-1-pro, kling/v2-1-master, qwen/image-to-image, qwen/image-edit, bytedance/seedream-v4-text-to-image, bytedance/seedream-v4-edit. Each needs a modelInputSchemas entry in kie/src/model-schemas.ts. Add integration tests using jobs.createTask polling pattern. Refer to https://docs.kie.ai/market/ for each model's input schema.

title: Add fal kling-video v2.1 variants (std/pro/master i2v + master t2v)
description: fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/standard/image-to-video, /v2.1/pro/image-to-video, /v2.1/master/image-to-video, /v2.1/master/text-to-video. Schemas vary per docs — research each at https://fal.ai/models/fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/*/*. Research first, then add types/schemas/factory/tests/HAR.

title: Add fal kling-video motion-control endpoints (v3 std/pro, v2.6 std/pro)
description: 4 endpoints: /fal-ai/kling-video/v3/standard/motion-control, /v3/pro/motion-control, /v2.6/standard/motion-control, /v2.6/pro/motion-control. All share schema: prompt?, image_url (req), video_url (req), keep_original_sound?, character_orientation (req enum image/video). **Blocker**: fal.run rejects data: URIs for video_url ('Video URL is invalid' 422). Need to upload the ref video via fal.serverless.files.uploadLocal or use a public CDN URL. Investigate before writing tests.

title: Add fal xai/grok-imagine-video/text-to-video endpoint
description: Third attempt failed with repeated 'TypeError: fetch failed' errors from fal.run. Video i2v works fine but t2v endpoint may be flaky or require queue-based submission. Investigate: (1) try queue.fal.run pattern with polling, (2) verify endpoint is actually live, (3) test manually with curl. Docs: https://fal.ai/models/xai/grok-imagine-video/text-to-video/api

title: Add kie bytedance/seedance-2 multimodal reference integration test
description: Upload image + mp4 + mp3 fixtures, then call createTask with reference_image_urls + reference_video_urls + reference_audio_urls for bytedance/seedance-2 multimodal mode. Use cheapest settings (480p, 4s, no audio). Poll to success and commit HAR.

title: Add kie bytedance/seedance-2 first+last-frame integration test
description: Upload two local image fixtures, then call createTask with first_frame_url + last_frame_url for bytedance/seedance-2. Use cheapest settings (480p, 4s, no audio). Poll to success and commit HAR.

title: Add kie bytedance/seedance-2 first-frame integration test
description: Upload a local image fixture via fileStreamUpload, then call createTask with first_frame_url for bytedance/seedance-2 (image-to-video, first frame only). Use cheapest settings (480p, 4s, no audio). Poll to success and commit HAR.

title: Add integration test for kie bytedance/seedance-2
description: The bytedance/seedance-2 model already has zod + model-schemas entries and is wired up via createTask. Add an integration test (text-to-video, cheapest settings: 480p, duration 4, no audio) mirroring tests/integration/kie-seedream-5-lite-text-to-image.test.ts, record a HAR, and verify replay.

title: Remove dead code: endpoint-docs-seed.mjs + wire apply-sigok-comments.mjs
description: Deleted scripts/endpoint-docs-seed.mjs (one-off bootstrap, TSV already populated). Wired scripts/apply-sigok-comments.mjs into pnpm as lint:signatures:fix. Implemented in commit 16250cb on main.

title: fal: wrap wan-22-trainer endpoints (i2v + image)
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-22-trainer/i2v-a14b and /v1/fal-ai/wan-22-image-trainer. Training endpoints (not inference). Skip unless there's a concrete user request.

title: fal: wrap wan-i2v-lora legacy endpoint
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-i2v-lora. Older i2v LoRA endpoint: num_frames 81-100, frames_per_second 5-24, guide_scale (default 5), shift (default 5), aspect_ratio (auto|16:9|9:16|1:1), loras, reverse_video, turbo_mode. Defer unless there's demand.

title: bd-noremote-smoketest
description: Verify no auto-push warning after remote removal
